free_text: Yield  and  cross section for fission of odd nuclei by
gamma-rays with energy up to 11 MeV.
Results of  relative measuring of photofission  yields
and  cross  sections  for   nuclei  233,235U,  237Np,
239,241Pu and  241Am in the energy region 5 - 11 MeV.
- Eng.trans.of YF,55,3153,1992.
-Engl.transl. of  YK,,(3-4),59.
The fissile targets, with  an  isotopic purity  better
than 95%, consisted  of oxide films 10 mm in diameter
and 0.5-0.8 mg/cm2 thick on an aluminum substrate.
MICA-FOILS.
The results  of  relative  (relatively  to   the  238U
photofission  yield)  measuring  for   Bremsstrahlung
end-point energies 7 - 11 MeV.
by A.S.Soldatov.
Data were compiled at the Russia  MSU SINP
CDFE by V.Varlamov.
SD: Ref. on YK corrected according to
MEMO CP-D/535(Rev.). Ref. on Engl. transl. added.
VV: STATUS, HISTORY.
Corrected by SD and VV:  REFERENCE update:
to  MEMO 4C-4/216, STATUS.

using the iterational method from  the  experimental
